rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal; oil price decline continues as background positive, and no new qualitative changes touch Portuguese daily life. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Oil prices fall and shares jump after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: Continued oil price decline offers mild indirect relief on energy and transport costs for Portuguese consumers, but is an ongoing trend with no new shift this cycle.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident at a festival in nearby Spain (Cártama, Málaga) is a minor regional safety incident with negligible impact on Portuguese daily life.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A UK-Japan bilateral trade deal has no direct impact on Portugal, though it signals continued post-Brexit UK trade activity in the broader European context.
